query: Vantaa-hiihto cross country ski race Vantaa

videos.title: Havuja Perkele / HIIHDON  SUOMEN CUP 2022 HAKUNILA, VANTAA
videos.description:
Havuja perkele. Hiihto Suomen Cup 2022 Hakunila Vantaa. Naiset 5 km (v).
Kävin katsomassa kisat. Aivan mahtavaa kaikin puolin.

videos.title: Nordic Running Race 29.9.2018
videos.description:
Nordic  Running Race (sauvajuoksu) LA 29.9.2018 (music: bensound.com)
VHS 60v. juhlakisa  - 
Ajankohta: Lauantai 29.9.2018 klo 12
Paikka: Hakunilan urheilukenttä, 
             Luotikuja 2, 01200 Vantaa  
      
Avoin kaikille kilpailijoille ja kuntoilijoille!
Sarjat : 
N / M 8 – 10v  1 km
N / M 12v ja N 14v  2 km 
M 14, M ja N 16 - 18v  4 km
N  18 – N  6 km
M 18 – M  8 km 
Kuntoilijat  6 km

ILMOITTAUTUMINEN: www.vhs.fi

videos.title: Yoko Race Day Service, Finnish Championship Team Sprint, Vantaa 12.1.2018
videos.description: Yoko Skis are made in Finland and can and are used by a wide range of racing skiers. A race day ski service is constant in work search of the best possible slide + grip combo, with the test skiers trying variety of different waxing options and the waxing guys adjusting the skis throughout the day. Just how much work, see for yourself how our Racing Service and skiers did in the Finnish Championship Team Sprint Race on Jan 12th, 2018.

videos.title: Euroloppet race BIELA STOPA Slovakia Cross-Country Skiing
videos.description:
Invitation for amazing XC Skiing Marathon race in the central Europe near Kremnica city - Slovakia.
Join EUROPEAN CHAMPIONSHIPS 4 -5.3.2023!

videos.title: Teemu Virtanen’s 24-hour Guinness World Record attempt 2022
videos.description: Live broadcast from Stockholms Stadion. Teemu Virtanen will try to beat the Guiness World Record in cross country skiing in 24 hours. He will start Saturday at 10.00 local time in Stockholm and ski for 24 hours. The goal is to ski more than 470 kilometers.

videos.description: Finlandia-hiihdon kakkoseksi puristi Niko Koskela. Tsekkaa videolta Nikon mietteet kisan ratkaisuista.

videos.title: Scenery for Treadmill | Magnificent Finnish Afternoon Ski | 1 Hour Virtual Run / Virtual Ski
videos.channel: Treadmill Scenery by Strides and Summits
videos.description:
Run, bike, ski or just watch 1 hour of perfect winter skate skiing at the Paloheinä ski centre in Helsinki, Finland! This workout scenery for treadmill is great for your virtual run, bike or workout!

On Strava? Join the Run Club! https://www.strava.com/clubs/StridesAndSummits

videos.title: Finlandia-Hiihto 2022 [4K]
videos.description: Vuoden 2022 Finlandia-Hiihdon tunnelmia ja maisemia runsas lumisesta Lahdesta. Lähtö Lahden hiihto stadionilta. Matkan varrelta kuvaa Messilästä ja Tiirismaan vanhan laskettelu-keskuksen kohdilta. Ilmakuvat kuvattu Dji Mavic mini 2 kopterilla.
